content:
Hi, I'm Joseph Sutorus, a software developer and solopreneur. This space serves as a central hub for my thoughts, projects, and the things that inspire me. I've always enjoyed building things from scratch, whether that's architecting a new application, brainstorming technical solutions, or refining my own digital workspace to share what I'm currently reading, watching, and playing.

When I'm not writing code, you can usually find me outdoors. My wife Elizabeth and I love exploring trails and capturing the beauty of nature—especially alongside our two wonderful dogs, Henry and Winston. Over recent years, I've thoroughly enjoyed challenging myself with backpacking trips through incredible locations like Yosemite, the Sawtooths, and the Wind River Range. Thanks for stopping by to follow along with my journey and the work that I do!
